titleStmt.title: SII 34.323: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 323. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the Bṛihadamba shrine in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Jaṭāvarman Sundarapāṇḍya, 9th year, Vṛiśchika, 22, Wednesday, Svāti = A.D. 1260 (?).

Araiyaṉ Tiruvaiyāvūr-udāiyāṉ alias Tāyilunallāṉ of Maram in Kiḻār-kūṟṟam a unit of Nittavinōda-vaḷanāḍu purchased land from the temple of Tiruvarankuḷam and gifted the same as tirumaḍaippaḷḷi-puṟam of the goddess.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ cu
ntarapāṇṭiya tēvarkku yāṇṭu 9 � vṛścika nāyaṟṟu 2 10 2 nāḷ
putaṉ kiḻamai peṟṟa cōti nāḷ Irāca Irācavaḷanāṭṭu vallanāṭṭu
Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉ kuḷamuṭaiyanayanā tirukkōyil Āticaṇṭēcura
tēvarkaṉmikaḷum śrī[ māhēśvarakaṇ] kāṇi cēvārkaḷum kōyil kaṇakku
Āka Ivvaṉaivōmum nittaviṉōta vaḷanāṭṭu kiḻār kūṟṟattu marattukkiḻavaṉ
Araiyaṉtiruvaiyāvūruṭaiyāṉāṉatāyilunallāṉukkunilavilaippirammā
ṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉkuḷamuṭaiyaṉāyaṉār tirukkā
makkōṭṭa nācciyāṟkut tirumaṭaippaḷḷipuṟam Ivar taṉmamāka koṇṭu vi
ceyyāṉ yaṟku naṉṟāka Ivar kaṇakku tāyilu nallāṉ viṭṭa nila
māvatu Araiyar pakkal Ikkōyililk kollakkuṭi makkaḷil
ṉ tāyaṉāṉa ve kkollaṉ palar pakkalilum vilai koṇṭuṭai
vayalum ceṅkuḷamum Inta vayalum kuḷattukku nāṉ kellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa
puñcaiyum puḷiyum tirukkāmakkōṭṭattu nācciyāṟkkut tirumaṭaippaḷḷiyā
Ivar koṇṭu viṭukaiyil Ivarkaṭṭiṉa cantikku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭikku Uṭal
paṇi paṇṭārattil Oṭukki I vayalum kuḷamum
nācci kku tirumaṭaippaḷḷi māka vilaippiramāṇam kāṇi
Araiyaṉ Uṭaiyāṉāṉa tāyilu nallāṉukku Uṭaiyā
muṭaiyaṉāyaṉār kōyil Āticaṇṭēcuratēva kaṉmikaḷum śrīmākē
cayvārkaḷum kōyil kaṇakkum maṭaippaḷḷiyum
taṉmam
Digital edition of SII 34.323 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
